name: Lemon Parsley Stuffing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine bread crumbs (approximately 1/4 of a loaf) with onion, parsley, lemon peel, marjoram, thyme, pepper, and garlic.
2. Mix well to ensure even distribution of ingredients.
3. In another bowl, whisk together eggs, melted butter, water, and lemon juice.
4. Add the egg mixture to the bread mixture and stir until all ingredients are evenly incorporated.
5. Use the stuffing mixture to stuff a 10-12 lb turkey, or spoon it into a 2 quart casserole dish.
6. Bake uncovered at 325°F for 30-40 minutes.
7. Makes 7 cups of stuffing.
